verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let my walk speak loud, And my words be true Let my life be whole, With my eyes on You Lord, I'm stepping out From the comfort zone Letting go of me, Holding onto You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Freedom comes, When I call You, Lord You are Lord, my God.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are the centre of it all, The universe declares in awe Your majesty, I surrender all.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I make You, The centre of my life Lord, I respond with all I am You placed in me the song Of heavens melody. Your Majesty, I live to sing Your song.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I have found Your peace, It replaces any fear. You have done it all I can trust in You So I'm stepping out From the comfort zone Letting go of me Holding onto You.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You are the centre of it all, The universe declares in awe. Your majesty, I surrender all.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I make you The centre of my life Lord, I respond with all I am You placed in me the song Of heavens melody Your Majesty, I live to sing Your song.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: This is Your song not mine It is Your song that bring Healing to this land This is Your song not mine It is Your song That brings freedom.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Freedom comes, when I call You, Lord. Freedom comes, when I call You, Lord. You are Lord, my God. You are the song. You are the majesty. I live to sing Your song. Your majesty, My life will sing Your song.
